prompt: Create a dramatic vertical cinematic action-horror scene on a rain-slick luxury hotel rooftop in Manhattan during a violent storm. Use a wide-angle 24mm lens perspective, photorealistic movie still quality, cold blue-grey color grading, high contrast, wet reflections, wind-driven diagonal rain, and heavy storm clouds over a dark city skyline. In the center foreground, place a faceless tactical survivor standing full body, facing camera, wearing black tactical clothing, body armor, straps, gloves, knee pads, and combat boots, holding a tan suppressed assault rifle with scope across their torso. On the left, show an open rooftop service door set into a concrete wall; from inside the dark doorway, exactly 10 zombie attackers crowd outward, visible as decayed faces, torsos, and grasping arms reaching toward the survivor. The 10 visible zombie elements are: 1 upper snarling face and hand at the top of the doorway, 2 a side face and arm beneath it, 3 a reaching upper arm cluster near the survivor’s shoulder, 4 a central torso with obscured face, 5 a lower central figure pressing forward, 6 a left-hand figure gripping the doorframe, 7 a mid-lower figure with both arms reaching, 8 a crouched lower-left zombie body, 9 a bottom-left crawling hand, and 10 a bottom doorway hand reaching from shadow. Behind the survivor on the right, show a destroyed smoking military helicopter burning on the rooftop, with orange flames, black smoke, broken rotor blades, debris, and fire reflected on wet rooftop tiles. In the lower right foreground, place exactly 1 curved katana lying on the wet floor with a black handle and pale blade. The rooftop should have large dark square tiles, puddles, raindrops, and reflective surfaces; the city beyond should include multiple high-rise buildings fading into storm haze. Keep the scene tense, realistic, gritty, and cinematic, with no text, no watermark, no gore closeups, and the main character’s face left featureless or obscured.
